title: Web Application Server Logicals
text: Web Application Server Logicals Logicals for the Uniface Web Application Server are set in the wasv.asn assignment file. They are used to control error pages and output filters. ; wasv.asn [LOGICALS] Logical = Value Table 1. Web Application Server Logicals Logical Description More Information USYSHTTPTITLE Set the web error page title The USYSHTTP component uses these logicals in default error reporting. For more information, see Web Application Error Pages USYSHTTPHEADER Set the heading on the web error page USYSHTTPBODY Set the web error page text USYSHTTPBGCOLOR Set the web error page background color USYSHTTPBACKGROUND Set the web error background image UWEBOUTPUTFILTERS List the plug-in components for adding JavaScript to web pages generated by DSPs and USPs Creating a Web Output Filter Plug-in Was this topic helpful?
